issues.test_name: [sig-metal] should get working host from infra provider
issues.root_cause: The job failed during the `ofcir-acquire` pre-step, before any cluster provisioning or commatrix tests ran. The `ofcir-acquire` script POSTed to the OFCIR API (`https://ofcir.apps-int.master.ci.devcluster.openshift.com/v1/ofcir?name=<job>/<build>&type=host_el9`) to acquire a bare-metal `host_el9` CI
